prompt: Write a CommandFactory method called GetPlanogramsByStore that takes a string storeNumber parameter and returns a DataTable. It should call the stored procedure cx_planograms_by_store_get.

assertions.name: has-start-logging
assertions.description: _logger.Information Starting GetPlanogramsByStore() is the first statement in the method body

assertions.name: has-finish-logging-with-rowcount
assertions.description: _logger.Information Finished line includes retVal.Rows.Count rows before the return statement

assertions.name: has-try-catch-logger-error
assertions.description: catch (Exception ex) block calls _logger.Error(ex, GetPlanogramsByStore Exception)

assertions.name: uses-dynamic-parameters
assertions.description: DynamicParameters used and storeNumber is added as a parameter

assertions.name: uses-custom-schema
assertions.description: Stored proc is called via _customSchema prefix — schema is NOT hardcoded

assertions.name: calls-connection-cleanup
assertions.description: ConnectionCleanup(conn) is called inside the using block before it closes
